zh.lifeSummary: 當Ralph Hill Jr於1627年4月8日出生在英國波克夏賓費爾德時，他的父親Ralph Hill11624歲，母親Johan Trebick33歲。他於1660年11月15日與Martha Toothaker結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1695年4月9日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼比勒利卡享年68歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可比勒利卡。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ralph Hill Jr于1627年4月8日出生在英国波克夏賓費爾德时，他的父亲Ralph Hill11624岁，母亲Johan Trebick33岁。他于1660年11月15日与Martha Toothaker结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1695年4月9日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼比勒利卡享年68岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可比勒利卡。

nameMeanings.name: Hill
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived on or by a hill, from Middle English hill, hell, hull ‘hill’ (Old English hyll). Compare Hiller . This surname is also very common among African Americans.
English: possibly in some cases from the personal name Hille, a pet form of some name such as Hilger or Hillary .
German: from a short form of Hildebrand or any of a variety of other names, male and female, containing ancient Germanic hild ‘battle’ as the first element.

variants.name: Hillock
meanings: English and Scottish: topographic name for someone who lived ‘(by the) small hill’, from Middle English hillok, a diminutive of hille (Old English hyll ‘hill’). See Hill .

variants.name: Hills
meanings: English: variant of Hill with genitival -s if a relationship name, attested in Matilda Hilles, 1327 (Somerset), where the genitival form may signify widowhood; or with plural -s if habitational, attested in Johanne de Hyles, 1379 (Bickerstaffe, Lancashire), and Ricardo del Hyles, 1379 (Great Eccleston, Lancashire); or, with post-medieval excrescent -s, probably the most common form.

variants.name: Hiller
meanings: German: metronymic from Hille, a pet form of the female personal name Hildegund (see Hilke ).
German: from a masculine personal beginning with the ancient Germanic element hild ‘strife, battle’.

variants.name: Hil
meanings: Dutch (Van den Hil): topographic name from hil, hul ‘hill’, particularly in the sense of a flight hill above sea level in the southwestern Netherlands.

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.

en.lifeSummary: When Ralph Hill Jr was born on 8 April 1627, in Binfield, Berkshire, England, his father, Ralph Hill, was 11624 and his mother, Johan Trebick, was 33. He married Martha Toothaker on 15 November 1660. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 9 April 1695, in Billerica, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 68, and was buried in Billerica, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ralph Hill Jr est né le 8 avril 1627, à Binfield, Berkshire, Angleterre, son père, Ralph Hill, avait 11624 ans et sa mère, Johan Trebick, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Martha Toothaker le 15 novembre 1660. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 9 avril 1695, à Billerica, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterré à Billerica, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ralph Hill Jr am 8. April 1627 in Binfield, Berkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ralph Hill 11624 und seine Mutter Johan Trebick 33. Er hat am 15. November 1660 Martha Toothaker geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 9. April 1695 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Billerica, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Billerica, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph Hill Jr è nato il il 8 aprile 1627 nel Binfield, Berkshire, England, il suo padre, Ralph Hill, aveva 11624 anni e il suo madre, Johan Trebick, aveva 33 anni. Lui sposato Martha Toothaker il 15 novembre 1660. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 9 aprile 1695, nel Billerica, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 68 anni, e fu sepolto a Billerica, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Ralph Hill Jrが1627年4月8日にイギリスバークシュアイアビンフィールドで生まれた時，父Ralph Hillは11624歳，母Johan Trebickは33歳であった。1660年11月15日にMartha Toothakerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1695年4月9日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニービラーイカで68歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスビラーイカにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ralph Hill Jr(이)가 1627년 4월 8일 영국 버크실르 빈필드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph Hill(은)는 11624세였고, 그의 어머니 Johan Trebick(은)는 33세였다. 그는 1660년 11월 15일 Martha Toothaker(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1695년 4월 9일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 빌레리카에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 빌레리카에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph Hill Jr nasceu em 8 de abril de 1627, em Binfield, Berkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Ralph Hill, tinha 11624 anos e sua mãe, Johan Trebick, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Martha Toothaker em 15 de novembro de 1660. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 9 de abril de 1695, em Billerica, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 68 anos, e foi sepultado em Billerica, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ralph Hill Jr родился 8 апреля 1627 г. в местности бинфиелд, биркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Ralph Hill было 11624 года, а матери, которую звали Johan Trebick, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Martha Toothaker 15 ноября 1660 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер 9 апреля 1695 г. в местности биллирика, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 68 лет и был похоронен в местности биллирика, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ralph Hill Jr nació el 8 de abril de 1627, en Binfield, Berkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Ralph Hill, tenía 11624 años y su mamá, Johan Trebick, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Martha Toothaker el 15 de noviembre de 1660. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 9 de abril de 1695, en Billerica, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 68 años, y fue sepultado en Billerica, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
